It is a genus of flowering plants in the family Bignoniaceae, native to Madagascar. The species Rhodocolea telfairiae is a climbing plant with showy flowers that are typically red or pink in color. Rhodocolea telfairiae is classified as a species of flowering plant and is part of the order Lamiales. This classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
